title: Add CI golden gate workflow and rge-principal-audit command doc
problem: The GT22 merge gate has no mechanical enforcement (no CI), and /rge-principal-audit is referenced by handoffs but missing from .cursor/commands/. The inductive safety of main depends on every agent honoring the protocol; CI converts convention to guarantee.
acceptance_criteria: GitHub Actions workflow runs pytest tests/golden with RGE_LLM_MODE=mock.
Workflow runs safety auditor --audit full and fails on blocked reasons.
Workflow runs public-site npm run build when applicable.
rge-principal-audit command doc codifies the checkpoint performed in pre-phase-2 audit.
Golden tests and default pytest pass without Ollama locally.
non_goals: Do not remove temporary merge-to-main checkpoint in AGENTS.md yet.
Do not add live Ollama to CI.
Do not implement ticket-041 or later.
